name: Review Deterministic Scanners
description: Cross-language SAST / secrets / SCA / lint scanners that ground /review v2's deterministic tiers (semgrep, gitleaks, trufflehog, detect-secrets, osv-scanner, trivy, hadolint, actionlint, ast-grep, checkov, yamllint). Opt-in: not enabled by default. See issue #392.

enableSast.description: Install SAST + secret scanners (semgrep, gitleaks, trufflehog, detect-secrets)

enableLinters.description: Install config/CI/container linters (hadolint, actionlint, yamllint, checkov)

enableAstGrep.description: Install ast-grep (structural search used by /review graph.md). NB: the binary is 'ast-grep', never 'sg' (/usr/bin/sg is newgrp).
